sfa40_init_i2c.tooltip: Initialize SFA40 over I2C at fixed address 0x5D.

sfa40_read_data.tooltip: Read and cache HCHO, humidity, and temperature. Returns 0 reliable, 1 not ready, 2 warming/not in spec, 3 communication or CRC failure.

sfa40_value.tooltip: Read a value cached by the last refresh.

sfa40_read_serial.tooltip: Read SFA40 serial number and update serial number length. Stop measurement first.

sfa40_serial_length.tooltip: Read the valid serial number byte length.
